comment: Pure-Rust microbench numbers from commit 7457f18 (post-C1). Used as the perf floor for M1/M2/M3 work — any regression > 1.5x triggers a review. Regenerate by running `cargo run --release --bin bench_random_game -- --n-games 100 --seed-base 800001 --max-steps 30000` and `cargo run --release --bin bench_v1`.
